    Estimates the number of luminaires needed to achieve a target average illuminance over an area using the Lumen Method.
    static Real
    ThermalSimulator.thermalMass(ThermalSimulator.WallLayer layer, Quantity<Area> area)
    Calculates the thermal mass (heat storage capacity) of a building element.
